title: NPC to Cortical Neurons
author: Celeste M M Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x9bfr2n
materials: Feed cells every 2-3 days for 30 days.

steps.title: Ensure cells are plated at an appropriate density (e.g.
steps.instruction: Ensure cells are plated at an appropriate density (e.g.: 150K/well in 12-well plate; 75- 50K/well for 48 well plates; 30K/well for 8-well chamber slides) in NIM on pre-coated PLO/laminin plates.

steps.title: After 24:00:00 , replace with cortical...
steps.instruction: After 24:00:00 , replace with cortical neuron differentiation medium (Neurobasal medium, 1x B27, 20 ng/mL BDNF, 20 ng/mL GDNF, 0.5mM cAMP, 1% Glutamax, 1% penicillin/streptomycin)
